options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: ring_link
options.description:
Whether your ergo gain/loss is linked to other players.
Off disables the feature.
On enables the feature
Hard enable sending and receiving more difficult ring losses

options.name: ergo_to_ring_ratio
options.description: How much Ergo should be equal to one Ring in Ring Link

options.name: goal
options.description:
Choose your goal for the multiworld
King of Puppets: Defeat Romeo King of Puppets
Simon Manus: Defeat Simon Manus
Nameless Puppet: Defeat Nameless Puppet (Note this can be missed if you don't reach the humanity threshold)
Arlecchino Short: Defeat Arlecchino and the first 5 chapters of the base game
Arlecchino: Defeat Arlecchino including the full base game
Simon Manus and Arlecchino: Defeat both Simon Manus and Arlecchino
Nameless Puppet and Arlecchino: Defeat both Nameless Puppet and Arlecchino (Note this can be missed if you don't reach the humanity threshold)

options.name: dlc
options.description: Choose if the DLC will be enabled (Note any Arlecchino goal enables DLC by default)

options.name: dlc_items
options.description:
Choose if the DLC items are added to the item pool(Does nothing if DLC is enabled or Arlecchino goal is set)
Adds 5 locations on equipping Black Rabbit Brotherhood Clothes

options.name: require_horn_overseer
options.description:
Enable: Daylight-Weathered Horn is required to fight Two Face Overseer
Disable: Daylight-Weathered Horn isn't required to fight Two Face Overseer

options.name: require_bow_minigames
options.description:
Enable: Royal Horn Bow is Logically required to get some carnival mini-game checks
Disable: May have to use consumables to complete carnival mini-games

options.name: require_grindstone_chapter4
options.description: choose if Grindstone is Logically required for chapter 4 to be in logic

options.name: require_flame_grindstone_bishop
options.display_name: Require Flame Grindstone For Arche Bishop
options.description: choose if Flame Grindstone is Logically required for Arche Bishop to be in logic

options.name: require_upgrade_core_dlc_chapter2
options.display_name: Require Upgrade Core For DLC Chapter 2
options.description: choose if Upgrade Core is Logically required for Chapter 2 of the DLC to be in logic

options.name: chapter6_access
options.description:
early: Only requires Hotel access + Combat Logic Rules.
Early_porgan: Requires Hotel access and can reach Scrapped Watchman + Combat Logic Rules.
Vanilla: Requires access to first Black Rabbit Brotherhood fight + Combat Logic Rules

options.name: quartz_combat_logic
options.description:
Enable: Quartz are included in logic
Disable: Quartz are not included in logic

options.name: combat_logic
options.description: Change how impactful combat logic is for your game

options.name: early_krat_central_station
options.display_name: Early Krat Central Station Main Entrance Key
options.description: Force Your Krat Central Station Main Entrance Key into an early sphere in your world or across all worlds.

options.name: early_weapon_assemble
options.description: Force Your Enigma Assembly Tool into an early sphere in your world or across all worlds.

options.name: shop_weapons
options.description: Add Shop Weapons into the item pool (You can still obtain shop weapons in their respective shops)

options.name: boss_weapons
options.description: Add Boss Weapons into the item pool (You can still obtain boss weapons via Alidoro)

options.name: golden_lie
options.description: Adds the Golden Lie into the item pool (you can still obtain it via humanity)

options.name: boss_amulets
options.description: Add Boss Amulets into the item pool (You can still obtain boss amulets via Alidoro)

options.name: additional_quartz
options.description: Add additional quarts to the item pool

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.
